title: Karjat Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Karjat with a Z-Score of +5.71. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Karjat has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is unusually high, resulting in a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 19.0 GG, while the Heating Degree Day (HDD) is 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 32% and the wind speed is 10.7 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the heat wave effects in Karjat.
